Input

{
  "command": "str_replace",
  "new_str": "\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n",
  "old_str": "\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n",
  "path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go",
  "security_risk": "MEDIUM"
}

{
  "command": "create",
  "file_text": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, matchedOperator, err := s.evaluator.evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\n\t\tswitch matchedOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tver.SegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tver.SegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
  "security_risk": "MEDIUM"
}

"140                                  e.logger.Debug(reason)\n   141                                  segmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n   142                                  segmentMatches++\n   143                          }\n   144                  }\n   145\n   146                  switch rule.SegmentOperator {\n   147                  case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n   148                          if segmentMatches < 1 {\n   149                                  e.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n   150                                  continue\n   151                          }\n   152                  case flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n   153                          if len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n   154                                  e.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n   155                                  continue\n   156                          }\n   157                  }\n   158\n   159                  // Segments matched for this rule \u2014 record the operator.\n   160                  matchedOperator = rule.SegmentOperator\n   161\n   162                  // For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n   163                  // The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n   164                  // If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n   165                  // in the segmentKeys slice."

"60  func (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n    61          resp, matchedOperator, err := s.evaluator.evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n    62          if err != nil {\n    63                  return nil, err\n    64          }\n    65\n    66          var reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n    67\n    68          switch resp.Reason {\n    69          case flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n    70                  reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n    71          case flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n    72                  reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n    73          default:\n    74                  reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n    75          }\n    76\n    77          ver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n    78                  RequestId:         r.RequestId,\n    79                  Match:             resp.Match,\n    80                  Reason:            reason,\n    81                  VariantKey:        resp.Value,\n    82                  VariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n    83                  FlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n    84          }\n    85\n    86          if len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n    87                  ver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n    88\n    89                  switch matchedOperator {\n    90                  case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n    91                          ver.SegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n    92                  case flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n    93                          ver.SegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n    94                  }\n    95          }\n    96\n    97          return ver, nil\n    98  }"

Input

{
  "message": "All tasks are complete. Here's a precise summary of every file changed and why:\n\n---\n\n## Completed Changes\n\n### 1. `rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.proto`\nAdded `string segment_match_type = 10;` to the `VariantEvaluationResponse` message. This is the proto source of truth for the new field.\n\n### 2. `rpc/flipt/evaluation/evaluation.pb.go`\nAdded to the `VariantEvaluationResponse` struct:\n- **Field**: `SegmentMatchType string` with proto tag `protobuf:\"bytes,10,opt,name=segment_match_type,json=segmentMatchType,proto3\"`\n- **Getter**: `GetSegmentMatchType() string` returning `x.SegmentMatchType`\n\n### 3. `internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go`\nRefactored `Evaluate()` into two methods:\n\n- **`Evaluate()`** (public, signature unchanged \u2014 existing tests/callers unaffected):\n  ```go\n  func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx, flag, r) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n      resp, _, err := e.evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n      return resp, err\n  }\n  ```\n\n- **`evaluate()`** (unexported, new) \u2014 contains all original logic plus captures `matchedOperator = rule.SegmentOperator` immediately after the segment-operator switch passes (i.e., when a rule's segments have matched), returning it as a third value:\n  ```go\n  func (e *Evaluator) evaluate(ctx, flag, r) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, matchedOperator flipt.SegmentOperator, err error)\n  ```\n\n### 4. `internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go`\nModified `variant()` to call `s.evaluator.evaluate()` (possible because `s.evaluator` is `*Evaluator`, a concrete type in the same package) and populate `SegmentMatchType`:\n\n```go\nresp, matchedOperator, err := s.evaluator.evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n// ...\nif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n    ver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n    switch matchedOperator {\n    case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n        ver.SegmentMatchType = \"ANY\"\n    case flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n        ver.SegmentMatchType = \"ALL\"\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Mapping**: `OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR` \u2192 `\"ANY\"`, `AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR` \u2192 `\"ALL\"`, no segment matched \u2192 `\"\"` (zero value, field omitted).\n\nAll files pass `gofmt -e` syntax validation."
}
